positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a cosmic sloth hanging from a crescent moon. The sloth has a clean, stylized silhouette with subtle gradient accents in deep teal and cosmic violet. The scene is set against a backdrop of stylized nebulas and geometric stars in muted golds and pastel purples. Flat vector style with strong outlines and pops of contrasting color, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetrical balance, cinematic overhead view. Clean lines, high contrast, print-ready, vector art, digital illustration, 8k.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, noisy, blurry, low contrast, gradient over parts, text, watermark, logo, writing, signature, grainy, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, jpeg artifacts, cropped, bokeh
